calendar.matters:
Petition For Irder Determining Title To Real Property.
Off Calendar Jun-29-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Neal McGettigan for the petitioners.

The Court asked if venue is proper. Mr. McGettigan stated that all of the assets are in San Francisco, that the trustees meet at the property in San Francisco to administer the trust and that they are trying to decide if they will sell this property. The Court asked if there have been any objections or opposition to the petition. Mr. McGettigan stated that the 4 beneficiaries are also the petitioners. The court stated that it had no issue with the merits and granted the petition for order determining title to real property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
